comments.post_body:
APM (Agent Package Manager) has a new home in the Microsoft Open Source GitHub organization.

I created APM to solve a problem I kept seeing: AI coding agents are powerful, but configuring them consistently across a team is still manual and fragile. 

Some teams are already using it in production. Moving APM to the Microsoft Open Source organization gives it better visibility, proper OSS governance, and a place where the community can keep building it together.

To be clear: APM is a community-driven open source project, not a supported Microsoft product. If you have questions, bugs, or ideas — open an issue or a discussion on the repo.

https://lnkd.in/e78Bv9GU

Thank you Sebastien DEGODEZ François Descamps Rich James for your early contributions and adoption. Let's keep building from here.
comments.context_summary: The creator of APM, a tool for managing AI coding agents, has moved the project to the Microsoft Open Source GitHub organization to improve visibility and community governance. This move aims to facilitate further development and adoption of APM, a community-driven open source project.

comments.post_body:
Big news!! I am starting a new chapter as Microsoft GTM, Strategy & Operations Director and moving to San Francisco 🚀 I’m incredibly excited and grateful. 

Working with amazing partners has made every day easier and more fun, and colleagues have truly become family. Huge thank you to Jaclyn S. and Matt F. for the trust and opportunity. Can’t wait to help shape the shared GitHub + Microsoft technical strategy with our partners. 

This one feels big — and I’m so ready for it.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is announcing their new role as Microsoft GTM, Strategy & Operations Director and expressing gratitude to their colleagues and mentors, while also looking forward to shaping the technical strategy with GitHub and Microsoft partners. They are starting a new chapter in their career and moving to San Francisco.

comments.post_body:
It's official: BVNK is joining Mastercard 🚀 

Running the M&A process for this was a massive undertaking and personally, a huge career highlight. But the real story is what this means for the industry.
We are bridging the gap between traditional finance and the on-chain economy, at a scale that was unimaginable just a few years ago. Stablecoins aren't just an "alternative" anymore, they’re becoming the foundation for how money moves.

Check out the full details in the blog below 👇 

https://lnkd.in/ev4G4ziD
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to the announcement of BVNK joining Mastercard, a significant milestone in bridging traditional finance and the on-chain economy. This move is expected to have a major impact on the industry, with stablecoins becoming a foundational element in the movement of money.

comments.post_body:
Quelle place pour l’IA générative dans les entreprises ?

✨ J’ai eu l’opportunitée incroyable d’en parler sur le plateau de BFM Business, aux côtés de Xavier PERRET, pour parler d’IA générative et partager ce que nous construisons chez Microsoft dans le domaine des agents IA, dans l’émission animée par Frédéric Simottel.

🎙️ Cette édition spéciale portait sur un sujet passionnant :  comment les entreprises peuvent créer, personnaliser et orchestrer leurs propres agents IA pour transformer leurs processus métier.

Durant l’émission, nous avons exploré les cas d’usage concrets d’une IA plus autonome, capable non seulement de répondre, mais d’agir, de collaborer, et de s’intégrer dans les systèmes d’information de l’entreprise.

🙏 Un grand merci à Xavier, Alice & Justine pour leur confiance – cette opportunité n’aurait pas été possible sans vous. Et bien sûr, un immense merci à la Dream Team Apps Inno grâce à qui j'apprends sur ces sujets chaque jour  Xavier, Matthieu, David, Francois-Xavier, Nicolas, Olivier, Benoit 🫶

🎥 Je vous laisse ci-dessous un extrait d’une démonstration partagée pendant l’émission.
C’est une illustration parlante d’une question que l’on retrouve souvent chez nos clients :
“Quel modèle choisir pour mon agent IA ?”
Un choix qui peut sembler secondaire, mais qui a un impact direct sur le comportement de l’agent, sa capacité à comprendre, raisonner, et interagir efficacement.

👉 Pour voir l’intégralité de l’émission, le replay est disponible ici : http://msft.it/6044SLdTQ
comments.context_summary: The commenter is discussing the role of generative AI in businesses, having recently appeared on a BFM Business episode to talk about Microsoft's work in the field, and is sharing insights on how companies can create and utilize their own AI agents. The discussion focuses on the potential of autonomous AI to transform business processes and the importance of choosing the right model for an AI agent.

comments.post_body:
🆕 New Role
I’m thrilled to share that I’ve stepped into a new role as Cloud & AI Sales Lead for #Manufacturing and #Automotive at #Microsoft. This is a great opportunity to support our customers as they accelerate their digital transformation journeys and evolve into #frontier firms.
🙏 Thank You
 A heartfelt thank you to my management—Frederic Pozzi and Sarah G.—for your trust and support.
🤝 Looking Ahead
 To my new team: I’m energized by the road ahead and confident that, together, we’ll achieve great things. Let’s make innovation happen!
🌟 Gratitude
 Finally, a special thank you to my former manager, Xavier Moreels, and my incredible former team. The achievements we made together and the journey we shared will always be a source of pride. Wishing you all continued success and growth in the years to come.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a post announcing a new role as Cloud & AI Sales Lead for Manufacturing and Automotive at Microsoft, where the author expresses gratitude and enthusiasm for the new opportunity. The commenter is likely offering congratulations or support for this new role.

I've loved the last three and a half years at GitHub - especially since jumping into the world of Copilot 🚀 - and I'm excited for many more years of shipping and learning with so many smart and dedicated people.

comments.post_body:
I am thrilled to announce that I have recently been officially admitted as a Solicitor in the Senior Courts of England and Wales. 

This achievement marks an essential milestone in my legal career, alongside the recent completion of an LL.M. in International Business Law at Middlesex University – Dubai, focusing on UK Employment Law and UAE and DIFC Employment Law.

I vow to leverage this expertise for the best interest of my clients, particularly those expanding beyond a single territory and seeking advice from counsel equipped with a cross-border and international understanding of Employment Law, whether in the UK, the UAE, or France.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to an announcement about being admitted as a Solicitor in the Senior Courts of England and Wales, a significant milestone in their legal career. They are likely congratulating the individual on this achievement and their expertise in International Business Law and Employment Law.

comments.post_body:
Uber excited 😀 
Hello my World,

I’m thrilled to share that I am starting freelancing as a Tech Recruiter for Uber! My focus is on sourcing and hiring top tech talent to support Uber's innovative initiatives in transportation and beyond 🚘 
A special thanks to Amal Patankar for onboarding me!

👩‍💻 As part of this role, I'll be actively seeking skilled engineers across various domains. If you're looking for new opportunities or know someone who is, let's connect! 

🏢 Uber's commitment to innovation and global impact aligns perfectly with my career goals. I’m excited to contribute to their mission while enjoying working with international TA teams and teammates in Amsterdam!
#LifeAtUber

Stay tuned for updates on tech trends, job opportunities, and insights into navigating the tech recruitment landscape. Whether you're a candidate or fellow recruiter, I'm here to collaborate and share knowledge.

🤝 Let's chat! Drop me a message or comment below to discuss how we can work together to drive innovation and make a meaningful impact.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is excited to share that they are starting a new role as a Tech Recruiter for Uber, focusing on sourcing top tech talent, and is looking to connect with skilled engineers and collaborate with others in the field. They are thrilled to contribute to Uber's innovative initiatives and mission, and are open to discussing job opportunities and sharing knowledge with fellow recruiters and candidates.

comments.post_body:
New role / New challenges / New year <3

What a Head of Engineering (Operational Excellence and Cloud) means to me?

1. Increase your listening, along with learning from others
2. Dissent is a prized virtue built upon trust 
3. Discomfort is growth when based upon safety  
4. Treat everyone fairly while upholding accountability 
5. Value is something you must never overlook - pay attention
6. Appreciation is words & action
7. Above all, uplift others, through your decisions and mentorship 
8. Shine brightly when times are most trying

Thank you for this opportunity to serve the great and talented teams at PENN Interactive & theScore.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is sharing their perspective on what it means to be a Head of Engineering, highlighting key values such as listening, trust, and accountability, in response to their new role at PENN Interactive & theScore. They outline eight principles that guide their approach to leadership, emphasizing growth, fairness, and uplifting others.

comments.post_body:
If you would have told me 3 years ago that I’d be graduating from business school with an MBA, I would never have believed you. Coming from the social impact and international development sector, going to business school isn’t a very typical path, but I’m so encouraged to see that changing through the diversity of my MBA cohort at Oxford and other business schools – I gained so many network-building opportunities and transferable skills, from leadership development to venture-building and systems analysis, that I hope to take back into the sector.🌍

Last year was a whirlwind! I’m so thrilled to have completed my MBA at Saïd Business School, University of Oxford with a distinction and Dean’s List Honours. Milestones like these are not realised with the flick of a switch. It takes so much hard work, curiosity, dedication and a village of support. I’m very grateful to my village of friends, family, mentors and classmates for encouraging me to follow this through.🙌 
 
This year I’m looking forward to the next chapter 📖 where I’ll be joining the team at the LSE’s Marshall Institute & 100x Impact Accelerator to support their mission to scale and build a supportive ecosystem for social ventures and venture philanthropy!
comments.context_summary: The commenter is celebrating their graduation from Oxford's business school with an MBA, reflecting on the non-traditional path they took from the social impact sector and expressing gratitude for the support they received. They're now looking forward to joining the LSE's Marshall Institute and 100x Impact Accelerator to support social ventures and venture philanthropy.

comments.post_body:
Team members at WillowTree are early adopters of GenAI — exploring ways to leverage the rapidly evolving tool landscape to benefit how we work and what we deliver.

During this session, you will learn from expert GitHub Copilot users, Ellie Giles, Chris Sellek, Nish Tahir, and Kristine Horn as they share the value they get from the tool and a number of high impact use cases that play to the tool's strengths.

#githubcopilot #genai #softwaredevelopment
comments.context_summary: The post announces a session where expert GitHub Copilot users will share their experiences and high-impact use cases for the tool, and the commenter is responding to this announcement. The discussion is centered around leveraging GenAI tools like GitHub Copilot to improve work and delivery in software development.

comments.post_body:
Je suis très excité de vous annoncer que je vais participer à la conférence DevOps organisée par Les Affaires le 5 décembre, en live 🔴 à partir d'un vrai plateau de tournage! 🎥 😅

Je vais faire partie d'un des panels de discussion ayant lieu au courant de la journée, qui regrouperont plusieurs chefs de file québécois en matière de #devops, tels que Benjamin Lallement de GoLogic et Thierry Madkaud de Arctiq.

Le panel auquel je participerai s'intitule "Autonomiser les développeurs et leurs équipes". Nous y explorerons les défis inhérents au #devops et au #platformengineering (petit scoop, ils s'agit souvent de défis humains! 😁).

La conférence est un événement payant, mais vous pouvez utiliser le code promotionnel SPKDEV pour obtenir un rabais de 30% sur le prix d'admission!

Tous les détails ici:
https://lnkd.in/eW5c83gd
comments.context_summary: The author is excited to announce their participation in a DevOps conference organized by Les Affaires, where they will be part of a panel discussion on empowering developers and their teams. The conference will explore the challenges of DevOps and platform engineering, with a special promotional code available for a 30% discount on admission.

After almost 4 years of part-time studying, I’m extremely happy to share that I’ve completed my M.B.A. 🎉

This achievement didn’t come without its fair share of long study hours, balancing life between school & full time work, but I’m VERY proud of how dedicated and disciplined I remained throughout the entire process. 

A special thanks to my life partner, my colleagues & friends for the support. You know who you are 😉. 

Laurence Pelchat, MBA 👩🏼‍🎓

comments.post_body:
Découvrez ADEQUATI 🔵 Cabinet de conseil IT en Tunisie... 🇹🇳
Aujourd'hui, on vous emmène à la découverte de nos bureaux à Tunis.
Plus de 200 mètres carrés d'espace de travail à seulement 10 minutes de l'aéroport. 

🔵 Pourquoi un bureau en Tunisie ?
C'est en dépassant les frontières qu'on à réussi à répondre à la problématique de la pénurie des talents en France tout en optimisant vos coûts opérationnels. 

Notre équipe à Tunis, nous permet de vous proposer les meilleurs experts et une organisation de travail flexible selon vos besoins.

Les expertises en développement IT de notre bureau de Tunis :
👉🏻 Java, .NET, Node.JS, PHP Symphony
👉🏻 Angular, React, JS
👉🏻 iOS, Android, Xamarin

Vous souhaitez en savoir plus ? 
Contactez 📲 Loïc Puchois et Anthony Sfez 

#IT #Tunisie #Développement #Adequati #Externalisation
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a post about ADEQUATI, a Tunisian IT consulting firm, and its office in Tunis, which offers various IT development services. The post highlights the benefits of having a bureau in Tunis, including access to talented experts and optimized operational costs.

comments.comment_body:
I am happy for you my friend, you were a great mentor to me, and I'm sure our paths will cross again. You have done so much for this company, for each individual, and for the evolution of the DevSecOps culture in general.

You are a visionary, an outstanding human being, a brilliant mind, an open mind on any subject, and a voice that carries the DevOps values to bring innovation faster in people's lives. ✨ 

Thank you for your guidance Sir, the company that will welcome you will be a rocket with you as VP. 🚀 I wish you all the best
comments.post_body:
Exciting news! I am thrilled to announce that I am taking on a new role as a VP of engineering tomorrow (saying goodbye is always hard). After much thought and consideration, I have decided to make the move in order to have a larger impact within a company and be an integral part of the entire journey - from start to finish. I am particularly drawn to the opportunity to drive digital transformation and to witness firsthand the positive impact it can have on people's lives by removing the pain, sweat, and exhaustion. DevOps and SRE are about integrating the experience and happiness components to people, process and technology (Updating PPT to PPTX – not PowerPoint extensions 😉). I am looking forward to this new chapter in my career and can't wait to see what the future holds! 

The official post and company name is coming tomorrow.

It is important to be grateful to your past and how it contributed to your abilities that uplifted others, built resilience to challenges, and above all created value. I appreciate greatly the family I have made at Arctiq - A Benchmark Company and the growth and experiences it gave my family and I. Thank you for the past 4 years! <3

#engineeringleader #digitaltransformation #careerchange #technology #growth #engineering #grateful #devops
comments.context_summary: The commenter is announcing their new role as VP of engineering, expressing excitement for the opportunity to drive digital transformation and gratitude for their past experiences at Arctiq - A Benchmark Company. They are looking forward to this new chapter in their career and appreciative of the growth and experiences they had in their previous role.

comments.comment_body: Thank you Thierry. ❤️ I am happy we worked together. You are very talented and have skills unique in a space that is in desperate need of them. Keep shining ✨

comments.post_body:
J’ai le plaisir de vous annoncer que j’occupe désormais le poste de Analyste Investissement chez Optimum Gestion de placements (OGP).

Très enthousiaste à l'idée d'intégrer une équipe en or, dynamique et bienveillante tout en continuant d'interagir dans l'écosystème Optimum que j'affectionne particulièrement.

Converge is #DecarbonisingConstruction! 🏗️💚🌍 Hot off the tails of #COP26, watch Raphael Scheps, our CEO, explain how Converge is decarbonising construction.

Scalable, digital solutions are going to be key to hit our global decarbonisation targets by 2030 and 2050, and we’re more excited than ever about the impact we can have to support these goals.

A big thank you to Innovate UK and the UK Research and Innovation alongside our consortium partners (including Laing O'Rourke, Keltbray, Mace, Royal BAM Group nv, and many others) on the transforming construction challenge and helping to make it all happen!

and thank you to AKT II for letting us use part of their great RNZC grant video. 

#sustainability #UKNetZero #CarbonZero #Sustainability #decarbonization #BuildTheFuture #constructiontech #ai

I’m excited to announce that I have joined Benchmark Corp as an account manager working with the eastern branch. With DevOps/DevSecOps constantly evolving, Benchmark serves as an innovative leader in the space for Quebec and the eastern Canadian region. I couldn’t be more excited to start this next chapter in my career, eager to learn and grow in this new role. 

I want to thank Greg Chenier, Laurence Pelchat, and Helen Notley for their support throughout the recruiting process and for helping me land here. If you have any questions about Benchmark and what we have to offer in the DevOps space, just reach out to me. If you would like to connect to anyone in my network, let me know how I can help. I’d love to give back!
#devops #devsecops #cloudmigration

comments.comment_body: Thank you Steve ! It was a pleasure to work with a leader like you.
comments.post_body:
I am about to take on a new opportunity in my career and I would soon let you know about it. But first, I would like to thank the people that made my very rewarding adventure at the BNC possible: Frédéric Leblanc, Alain Bergeron, Dominique Fagnoule, Anne-Marie Roy and Stéphane Vermette who I have known for many many years and put me in contact with the great people listed before. Thanks Steph! It has been a hell of a ride and lots of fun for me to play a role in the NBC transformation for the past 3 years already. It went by so fast! I have been involved in many company transformations over the years, but never at the BNC scale ;-)

I absolutely want to thank all the team members of the DevOps Accelerators group I had the chance to assemble to tackle those transformation challenges, current and past in no particular order:

Catalysts: Philippe Borys, Rachid HMICHE, Antoine BARGE, Laurent Masson, Maxime Choffat

Pipeline as a Product team we created together: Kévin Lambert, Marc-Antoine Dubé, Philippe Boyd, Stéphane Rhéaume, Duc Phan, Guillaume Veschambre, Simon Turcotte, Mohamed Said Mezghanni, Hugo Leclair, Raphael Bouchard, david bollinger, Thierry Madkaud, 
Jaydeep Dave, Florian Frouin

DevSecOps team: Karim Rammaoui, oumar ly, Kodzo Mawuli WOZUFIA

comments.comment_body: Thanks a lot Thierry. I hope you have fun in your catalyst role!

Bonjour LinkedIn :)

Je recherche un développeur Angular 4 pour le projet Ordoclic (digitalisation des ordonnances médicales).

Nous travaillons sur une stack moderne (Go, Signal R, Electron), avec l'envie de réaliser les choses de la bonne manière.

Nous sommes sur le secteur de Lille, mais travaillons aussi en remote.

Si vous êtes motivé, compétent, et que le projet vous intéresse, envoyez moi un message pour discuter ;)

Bon week-end :)
